message:
test: add FABRIC integration, lab-vs-live contract, and regression tests

Add comprehensive test coverage for the new FABRIC messaging modules
and lab-vs-live differential testing infrastructure:

- fabric_lab_integration.rs: LabRuntime integration coverage for the
  FABRIC subject-cell foundation (gated behind messaging-fabric feature)
- messaging_fabric_progressive_disclosure_contract.rs: Contract checks
  ensuring FABRIC scaffold modules follow progressive disclosure rules
  by reading checked-in source rather than constructing full public API
- adversarial_lab_vs_live_stress_test.rs: Stress test exercising
  adversarial lab-vs-live divergence scenarios under load
- lab_live_differential_scope_matrix.rs: Contract tests verifying
  scope buckets, rollout order, and rch-offloaded validation policy
  for the differential testing program (bead 2a6k9.1.1)
- lab_live_scenario_adapter_contract.rs: Contract tests for shared
  ScenarioSpec shape and adapter boundary (bead 2a6k9.2.1)
- wasm_browser_execution_ladder_contract.rs: Browser Edition execution
  ladder checks focused on stale lane-health state masking hard
  prerequisite failures in candidate diagnostics
- websocket_acceptor_trailing_bytes.rs: Regression test for WebSocket
  acceptor handling of trailing bytes after upgrade handshake
- sync/notify_bug_test.rs: Targeted reproduction test for Notify
  waiter-slab edge cases discovered during audit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
